title: Williams (WMB) to Buy Gas Storage Portfolio for $1.95 Billion
text: Williams (WMB) is set to acquire a $1.95B natural gas assets portfolio in the Gulf Coast, establishing a strong hold over the rapidly evolving energy landscape.

title: This 5.1%-Yielding Dividend Stock Makes a $2 Billion Acquisition to Add More Fuel to Its Dividend Growth Engine
text: Williams is acquiring some natural-gas storage assets for $2 billion. The deal will supply the pipeline company with some incremental cash flow and upside potential.

title: Williams to buy natural gas storage assets for $1.95 bln
text: Dec 27 (Reuters) - Pipeline operator Williams (WMB.N) said on Wednesday it would buy a portfolio of natural gas storage assets from an affiliate of Hartree Partners LP for $1.95 billion, to cater to rising demand from liquefied natural gas projects.

title: Williams to pay $2 billion to buy natural gas storage assets from Hartree Partners
text: Williams Companies WMB, -0.06% announced Wednesday an agreement to buy a portfolio of natural gas storage assets for $1.95 billion from an affiliate of Hartree Partners L.P. The deal includes six underground storage facilities in Louisiana and Mississippi and 230 miles of gas transmission pipeline.
